facts_pipeline_890850275513.content: Chore tasks can still have meaningful build verification — the build stage here confirmed decompose creates worktrees and triggers parallel builds even when source files pre-exist.

conventions_kody_890851563880.content: The decompose pipeline requires complexity_score >= 4 and decomposable: true to trigger sub-task splitting; these thresholds are enforced in status.json.

conventions_kody_890853194610.content: Decompose expects 2+ sub-tasks, parallel builds, and a PR body with a 'Decomposed Implementation' section as part of its verification contract.

thoughts_kody_890854585211.content: Without prior decompose runs, globbing for decompose log files in the task directory will return nothing — logs only appear after decompose executes.

thoughts_srccomponentsnotificationstoast.content: React hooks (useCallback, useEffect, etc.) cannot be placed after an early-return guard; move all hook calls before any conditional return to satisfy react-hooks/rules-of-hooks.

thoughts_kody_decompose_pipeline_1019698.content: Files produced by @kody decompose introduce lint errors (unused imports, missing return types, barrel re-exports) that must be fixed before pipeline merge — generated code is not lint-clean by default

facts_react_hooks_1019700264372.content: When a component has an early no-op return, all useCallback/useEffect calls must precede it even if they appear logically unnecessary — the call site, not the function body, determines the rule violat

thoughts_pipeline_1987907731518.content: @kody decompose can introduce lint errors into the codebase — always run lint/verify after a decompose run to catch issues before merge.

facts_react_hooks_1987909140812.content: Conditional useCallback calls inside early returns violate React hooks rules and must be restructured so hooks are called unconditionally at the top level.

conventions_pipeline_1987910446403.content: When fix-lint runs on a stage with known lint failures, fix those errors in the same stage rather than surfacing them for a later pass.

thoughts_srcservicesnotificationsts4250_.content: payload.find({limit:0}) discards results; markAllRead was counting the query result (always 0), not actual matching rows.

thoughts_srcservicesnotificationsts_2076.content: Dynamic $and/$or operators in payload.find() create SQL injection surface even with the ORM; prefer explicit typed queries over raw object merging.

facts_pipelinekody_2076493389815.content: Pipeline verification tasks generate artifacts (event logs, stage diaries, graph nodes) that get committed alongside any real changes — review must separate signal from noise.

facts_pipelinekody_2076494949861.content: The task decomposition verification succeeded: @kody decompose correctly split the composite notification-system task into parallel sub-tasks covering models, services, routes, utils, and tests.

conventions_review_process_2076496270664.content: Review stage should produce a verdict (PASS/FAIL), summary, and findings grouped by severity before listing pass/fail criteria.
